channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Israeli lawmakers set up tribunal, allow for death penalty for October 2023 attackers
item.description: The measure passed 93-0 in the 120-seat Knesset, or parliament, reflecting widespread support for punishing those found responsible for what was the deadliest attack in Israel's history.
item.content:encoded:
The measure passed 93-0 in the 120-seat Knesset, or parliament, reflecting widespread support for punishing those found responsible for what was the deadliest attack in Israel's history.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: EU diplomats agree to sanction Hamas leaders and Israeli settlers
item.description: The unanimous decision by the European Union, agreed to on Monday, was sparked by growing outrage over the devastation in Gaza during the Israel-Hamas war.
item.content:encoded:
The unanimous decision by the European Union, agreed to on Monday, was sparked by growing outrage over the devastation in Gaza during the Israel-Hamas war.

(Image credit: Marius Burgelman)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump rejects Iran's ceasefire proposal response. And, Congress to tackle ICE funding
item.description: Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." And, Congressional Republicans are trying to push for three years of funding for immigration enforcement.
item.content:encoded:
Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." And, Congressional Republicans are trying to push for three years of funding for immigration enforcement.

(Image credit: Alex Wong)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Trump heads to China amid ongoing war with Iran
item.description: President Trump's trip to China is going forward despite the war with Iran casting a shadow over the state visit.
item.content:encoded: President Trump's trip to China is going forward despite the war with Iran casting a shadow over the state visit.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith

item.title: Nobel laureate Narges Mohammadi transferred to a Tehran hospital, her foundation says
item.description: Nobel Peace laureate and activist Narges Mohammadi has been transferred to a Tehran hospital more than a week after collapsing in prison, her foundation said Sunday.
item.content:encoded:
Nobel Peace laureate and activist Narges Mohammadi has been transferred to a Tehran hospital more than a week after collapsing in prison, her foundation said Sunday.

(Image credit: Narges Foundation Archive)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: AI on the agenda as Trump heads to China
item.description: Artificial intelligence on the agenda for President Trump's upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
item.content:encoded: Artificial intelligence on the agenda for President Trump's upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram

item.title: Remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing in Morocco have been recovered
item.description: The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.
item.content:encoded:
The remains of a U.S. soldier who went missing during military drills in Morocco were recovered in the Atlantic Ocean, the army said. Military teams are searching for a second missing soldier.

(Image credit: Mosa'ab Elshamy)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. cruise passengers arrive in the U.S. after one tests positive for hantavirus
item.description: One of the 18 Americans tested "mildly" positive for the virus during the U.S. return flight. A French woman has also tested positive — she was was among five French passengers repatriated to Paris.
item.content:encoded:
One of the 18 Americans tested "mildly" positive for the virus during the U.S. return flight. A French woman has also tested positive — she was was among five French passengers repatriated to Paris.

(Image credit: Chris McGrath)
item.dc:creator: Pien Huang

item.title: Israeli settlers force Palestinian family to exhume and rebury their father
item.description: The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.
item.content:encoded:
The relatives of Hussein Asasa described to NPR how they were forced to exhume and rebury their father when Israeli settlers interfered with his grave.

(Image credit: Ilia Yefimovich)
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: Trump says the Iran ceasefire is 'on life support' after rejecting an Iranian proposal
item.description: President Trump said Iran's latest response to a U.S. proposal was "unacceptable" and didn't address the country's nuclear program.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump said Iran's latest response to a U.S. proposal was "unacceptable" and didn't address the country's nuclear program.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster
